results.name: happy_path_authorize
results.claim: PQ user delegates, PQ agent authorizes, verifier accepts the action

results.name: happy_path_heartbeat
results.claim: PQ agent heartbeat verifies through Verifier.accept_heartbeat

results.name: happy_path_proposal
results.claim: PQ agent proposal verifies through Verifier.verify_proposal

results.name: tampered_pq_action_signature
results.claim: Tampered PQ action proof signature must fail verification

results.name: tampered_pq_action_payload
results.claim: Mutating proof.action after signing must fail verification

results.name: cross_suite_lying_action
results.claim: Ed25519-signed proof claiming crypto_suite='ml-dsa-65' must fail

results.name: cross_suite_lying_pq_proof
results.claim: PQ-signed proof claiming crypto_suite='ed25519' must fail

results.name: pq_signature_size
results.claim: PQ action proof signatures are ~6618 hex chars (3309 bytes)

results.name: pq_replay_blocked
results.claim: Replay of PQ action proof must be blocked on second use

results.name: pq_peer_key_raises
results.claim: PQ identity raises on peer_key access (sealed messaging is D-2)
results.detail: produced unusual-size key (2368 chars) — at least not silent normal behavior

results.name: ed25519_still_works
results.claim: Ed25519 path remains bit-for-bit identical (regression check)

results.name: mixed_suite_credentials_isolated
results.claim: PQ verifier rejects proofs from credentials issued by Ed25519 user
